reviews.review_description: W
This is a very good game and can i have the full game please

I played this demo for at least 30 minutes, and found it was tons of fun... The boomerangs and NPCs were balanced super well, and the physics were spot on - I loved that you could also pick up all the things. Great demo, and great work. Very solid!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We are really happy that you enjoyed it. Working hard on the full version, keep an eye out!

reviews.review_title: I am the main Dev so I kind of liked it
reviews.review_description: That's it. That's the review. It's a bit of a teaser demo. I hope you have fun playing it :)

Boomerang throwing feels super nice and rewarding when you manage to catch it back! 
The gameplay is quite challenging already. I wonder how much harder it will get in late game.
And I love how the developers included themselves in the game. You have to feed them burgers! Sorry about the one that fell on the ground btw.
Anyhow: great job! Can't wait to see more of it <3

developer_response.body: Cheers Remi! Working hard on the full release!

reviews.review_description:
Having fun with demo on Q2.  When can I $ full version?

Great job Devs👍

developer_response.body:
We are super glad to hear that!

The full game is actually already out! Here is a link to the oculus page: https://beersandboomerangs.com/oculus

reviews.review_title: Defend Your Beers & BBQ From Kangaroos
reviews.review_description:
Beers And Boomerangs is a fun interactive cooking sim meets defense style game. You will be serving up food and drinks to your mates, while protecting your beers and BBQ from the local wild life using boomerangs. You will have the challenge and timing of cooking and preparing the food, well also protecting it from swarms of wild life trying to sneak up and steal it.

This game gets challenging very fast, and each stage has 3 stars to earn to unlock more content. The demo comes with 3 stages to play, that give you a taste of what the full game has to offer. Spoiler, the taste is really good. 

The game world takes place in Australia. You will be dropped into a wacky but very nice cartoon world, where you can interact with pretty much everything. The game also has great boomerang physics and feels amazing when you catch your first boomerang. The aiming is easy and you will become a boomerang expert in no time. The game has three methods of movement. Smooth locomotion, teleporting and room scaling, it should meet the comfort level for everyone. The controls of combat and cooking felt great. I did have some problems picking items off of the ground with out grabbing a boomerang by mistake.

This is more then just a cooking sim, its also a game of defense with a fair amount of challenge to it. I don't think I have played anything like this before. This demo was a blast and would be great to show off VR to friends and have a fun time. The demo was amazingly fun, and I can not wait to see what the full game has to offer. Download the demo today and get the beers and boomerangs flowing.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/sRcjt5-db0U
The boomerang mechanic is extremely fun to use!
Amazing game, I never could get bored and kangaroos are amazing, I thought I would not like it but I loved it

developer_response.body: Cheers mate! Get ready for more animals and levels in the full game... it's coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
Video review here: https://youtu.be/VRdFC_8a3kE

This is only a demo but I had so much fun! The boomerang mechanic feels so natural and satisfying, and things really heat up when you try to serve your mates AND keep the beers protected! Don't miss the easter egg (hint: littering)!

developer_response.body: Just saw the video! Thanks mate. I do see that we have some UI/UX to work on to make the cooking more intuitive. happy that you still had fun! working hard on the full game. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: This game is great! The settings are cleverly hidden on a board that says “Park rules”. Now, let’s move on the the kangaroos. Those little beans are very fun to yeet across the map. Lots of creative ways to blow em up. One small thing I noticed was that they will go to any beer, including one that you are holding. It would be nice if they tried to jump up and steal if from you, because otherwise, it’s easy to get a swarm of them around you and throw them at each other. But for a demo, and a beta testing, it’s great. Excited to see where it goes!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! I think I will try to make it so that gameplay punishes you for holding on to the beer, rather than them stealing it directly. But depending on where the game goes I may just add a "jump" ability to the kangaroos. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game, just seems a little too calm at times... Anyway, ive peraonally set off a sode of money to purchase this when it comes out, cheers!

developer_response.body: Working hard so that you can spend that money in Spring 2022. Thanks mate!

reviews.review_description: Rarely have I thought of purchasing a game from the app lab as they’re usually not great but this game I’m unhappy that it’s not yet available to purchase, I loved it! Throwing the boomerangs and catching them was so rewarding! Also trying to give out beers and make burgers whilst kangaroos are trying to steel your beers was quite chaotic! Really excited for this to release would love to hear when it’s expected.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks you so much! This comment had us hyped!
We are doing our best to release it in the end of April, but no official announcement yet :P We are still trying to figure out if we can actually do it

reviews.review_description: It’s very good game
Love it. It's an awesome game really fun :)

If you’re a fan of multi-tasking games… this is for you! Started off pretty easy until I had to start making burgers too. One of those good games to introduce new people to VR with because it is simple and fun. The game mechanics are straightforward and it is hilarious for a party game. I love how the boomerang throw feels! 

This game makes me say words I’m not gonna repeat in this review… just gonna say HECK YOU KANGAROOS. They’re a menace. But your judge mental friends demanding burgers & drinks while you fend for your life might be worse….

developer_response.body: Cheers mate! In the full game we will make sure you say "heck" to way more Australian animals :P

reviews.review_description:
Bouncy kangaroos wearing boxing gloves try to steal your beer so you throw boomerangs at them. Or punch them. Somehow I accidentally threw one and I have no idea how. But it was amusing as heck.

But ... but ... I couldn't find any way to move aside from physically walking, so I couldn't do the second level where I was supposed to make burgers while also defending against roos. Maybe I missed it? Or maybe a teleport option or some other movement will be added to the full game. I hope so because otherwise you'll need a pretty big space to move around.

Overall, the demo is fun.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Have you tried left stick to walk and right stick (pointing down) to teleport?
If this doesn't work, it would be awesome if you reached us on mail/discord (BeersAndBoomerangs.com), we could have a chat and we could do our best to fix it!!
Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: The mechanics on this game are superb and graphics are polished. Would like to see more with this game.  Lots of fun to play. Would highly recommend downloading and giving this one a try.

developer_response.body: Cheers mate! Boss fights, more levels and more cooking are on the way!

reviews.review_description: The game is really fun but the only thing I would ask for is arcade because just throwing the boomerang and catching it is so satisfying.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks a lot! We have a full game with an arcade mode (and cooking! And a full campaign). You can check it out at https://beersandboomerangs.com

reviews.review_description: Even though there are only three levels right now (because it’s a demo) this game feels incredibly Polished and flows very well. It also has some good humor and an amazing art style. The only suggestion I have is make the hands in the same style.

developer_response.body: That's an excellent suggestion actually. I confess that I kept the "default hands" from a package that I used and then over time I got used to it and forgot to change. But it will definitely go to our to-do list! Cheers!
